message:
fix(e2e): clean up mobile test issues

- Remove unused setViewport import from viewports.spec.ts
- Fix safe area test that always returned true; now properly verifies
  tab bar exists and has fixed/sticky positioning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

   isHamburgerMenuVisible,
